name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖 [New] GG Super Mini Shoulder Bag. The initials of founder Guccio Gucci add a touch of elegance to the leather accessories, blending a modern small leather good with Gucci's deep design heritage. The textured and glossy classic GG pattern adds a unique touch to this elegant black mini shoulder bag. Black GG leather, cotton-linen blend lining, inside: 1 leather open pocket, adjustable shoulder strap (50cm high) magnetic snap closure.
name_cn:
💖Includes full original green box packaging💖 [New] GG Super Mini Shoulder Bag. The initials of founder Guccio Gucci add a touch of elegance to the leather accessories, blending a modern small leather good with Gucci's deep design heritage. The textured and glossy classic GG pattern adds a unique touch to this elegant black mini shoulder bag. Black GG leather, cotton-linen blend lining, inside: 1 leather open pocket, adjustable shoulder strap (50cm high) magnetic snap closure.
Model: 772794.
Dimensions: 13.5(L) x 21(W) x 3cm(H)
Color: Black/Embossed Original Leather.
Weight: approx. 0.34kg
Made in Italy
Fits iPhone Pro Max/Plus, small wallet, and lipstick
